error_message: Scan tab shows no inventory — tires/products never load, stuck on 'טוען...'
root_cause: ScanPage rendered <ScanClient /> without AppShell wrapper. useProfile() returns null because ProfileProvider lives inside AppShell. The useEffect guard `if (!profile) return` prevented load() from ever running, leaving items=[] and loading=true indefinitely.

error_message: בהצעות מחיר לא ניתן לבחור רוחב צמיג 125
root_cause: WIDTHS array started at 145, missing 125 and 135
fix: Added 125 and 135 to the beginning of the WIDTHS array

error_message: ייצוא אקסל של מוצרים לא כולל עמודת ברקוד, וייבוא לא מקלוט ברקוד
root_cause: exportExcel() headers and rows did not include barcode. importExcel() did not map barcode column and had no column slot for it.
fix: Added 'ברקוד' as second column in export headers+rows. Updated import to read r[1] as barcode and shifted all subsequent column indices by 1 (name r[1]→r[2], category r[2]→r[3], etc.)

error_message: בחיפוש מוצרים לפי מספר ברקוד לא מוצא את הפריט
root_cause: 1) ProductsClient: hay variable in filter didn't include p.barcode. 2) yard/search route: products OR filter searched name+sku but not barcode column.
fix: 1) Added p.barcode to the hay join in ProductsClient.tsx line 172. 2) Added barcode to select and barcode.ilike to the OR filter in yard/search/route.ts.
